verse.name: V1
verse.lines: When you finally make your entrance to the City, Of jasper walls and bright golden avenues; When you behold all its beauty and its splendor, Remember there's just one request I make of you.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Look for me, for I will be there, too, (I'd like to hear it, too) I realize when you arrive there'll be so much to view; After you've been there ten thousand years A million, maybe two, Look for me, for I will be there, too.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: As you go down your list of firsts, there's no question, You want to see your loved ones waiting there for you; And when you feel you've shared your story with the last one, Who wants to hear you tell just how you made it through.
